column1: C[pathogenix: This game is an interesting shape

pathogenix: It's not going that badly

pathogenix: Serves me right for not paying attention
C[holytshirt: erm playing with gut mainly
pathogenix: Everyone does, it's just that your gut gets more accurate
C[pathogenix: this game's prety much done. You still need to finish your territory on the right
pathogenix: If you take H5, you get to keep all that territory
pathogenix: otherwise white can threaten you there and you need to connect at J6
